'''Heavy Artillery''' was a team formed for the [[Taiwan eSports League/Draft Season|TeSL Draft Season]]. They were replaced by one of [[Wayi Spider]], [[yoe IRONMEN]], [[Gamania Bears]], or [[e-Sports Dragons Pro]] after the season.
